items.caption: In a school cafeteria, a group of children are gathered around a stainless steel lunch tray dispenser. the dispenser has a red tray with a banana and chicken nuggets. a woman, presumably the school principal, is smiling and watching the children as they serve themselves. the cafeteria has a yellow wall with a blue sign that reads "fill your glass to the line only!" taken from a side angle, capturing the interaction between the children and the dispenser.
